kinyarwanda.a_4_4_base_with_hollow_interior_wall_t: Urufatiro 4×4 rufite imbere irimo ubusa — ubugari bw'urukuta 1. Bara gusa kibe z'urukuta.
kinyarwanda.tapering_tower_each_level_smaller_than: Umunara ugenda ugabanuka. Buri rwego ni ruto kurusha urwabanjirije.
kinyarwanda.5_cube_plus_shape_1_layer_v_5: Ishusho yo kongeramo iva mu kibe 5, urwego 1. V = 5.
kinyarwanda.walls_flat_roof_v_4_4_base_wall_roof: Inkuta + igisenge kiringaniye. V = 4×4 urufatiro rw'urukuta + igisenge.
kinyarwanda.interactive_net_drag_the_slider_to_fol: 🗺 Urusobe rufatanya — kurura slider kugira ngo uhine urusobe rwa 2D rube purizimu ya 3D
kinyarwanda.fold_the_net_from_flat_0_to_fully_fold: Hina urusobe uhereye kiringaniye (0) kugeza rwahinnye burundu (1)
kinyarwanda.when_the_net_folds_up_completely_you_c: Iyo urusobe ruhinnye burundu, urebye purizimu. Ubuso ni ubuso bw'imbere zose 6 — impapuro zo gupfundikira.
kinyarwanda.net_the_6_faces_unfolded_onto_a_2d_lay: 🗺 Urusobe — imbere 6 zambuwe ku migambi ya 2D
kinyarwanda.fold_the_net_up_and_you_get_the_prism_: Hina urusobe maze ubone purizimu. Ubuso ni ubuso bwose bw'imbere 6 — impapuro zo gupfundikira cyangwa irangi uzakenera.
kinyarwanda.volume_out_of_range_for_comparison_try: Ingano iri hanze y'urwego rwo kugereranya. Gerageza purizimu ntoya (V ≤ 1000).
kinyarwanda.volume_grows_as_the_cube_of_the_dimens: ingano yiyongera nka kibe y'ingano; ubuso bwiyongera nka kare. V imwe, ariko ubuso butandukanye cyane.
kinyarwanda.a_cube_is_the_most_surface_efficient_p: Kibe ni ishusho ya purizimu ifite akamaro kurusha ku buso.
kinyarwanda.it_is_why_elephants_need_thick_legs_vo: Ni yo mpamvu inzovu zikeneye amaguru manini (ingano → uburemere bwiyongera vuba kurusha igice cy'igufa),
kinyarwanda.why_cells_stay_small_need_surface_area: impamvu selire zikomeza kuba nto (zikeneye ubuso bwo kwakira intungamubiri), n'impamvu ubudahwema bw'ubushyuhe bukora (ishusho ziruziruye zibika ubushyuhe).
kinyarwanda.tap_any_row_above_to_swap_the_3d_prism: 👆 Kanda umurongo uwo ari wo wose hejuru kugira ngo uhindure purizimu ya 3D ibe iyo shusho — reba ingano imwe mu buryo butandukanye.
kinyarwanda.reset_3d_view_rotation_and_zoom: Subiramo kuzenguruka no kwaguka kw'igaragaza rya 3D
kinyarwanda.slider_v_l_w_h_watch_it_grow: Slider — V = uburebure × ubugari × ubuhagarike, reba uko yiyongera
kinyarwanda.sliders_snap_to_integer_dimensions_gre: Ba-slider bifatana n'ibipimo byuzuye — byiza ku igaragaza rya mbere: kwikuba kabiri buri ruhande byikuba ingano incuro 8 (2³). Ubuso buguka nka 2²; ingano nka 2³. Itegeko rya kare-kibe risobanura impamvu inzovu zifite amaguru manini n'impamvu imbeba nto zishobora kugwa nta gukomereka.
kinyarwanda.freeform_build_any_shape_count_cubes: Bwisanzuye — ubaka ishusho iyo ari yo yose, bara kibe
kinyarwanda.l_blocks_hollow_shapes_irregular_prism: Udukoni twa L, ishusho zirimo ubusa, purizimu zidasanzwe. Ingano = igiteranyo cya kibe utitaye ku miterere. CCSS 5.MD.5: huza ingano ya purizimu y'urukiramende ihagaze no kugwiza no kongeramo (V = b×h cyangwa nk'igiteranyo cy'ingano z'ibice).
kinyarwanda.word_problems_volume_in_the_real_world: Ibibazo by'amagambo — ingano mu isi nyayo
kinyarwanda.a_fish_tank_with_5_3_4_60_cubes_of_wat: Itanki ry'amafi rya 5×3×4 = kibe 60 z'amazi. Agasanduku k'ibiryo bya saa sita 4×3×2 = kibe 24 za sandwich. Buri kugwiza kw'ibipimo bitatu ni ikigega nyako gifite ubushobozi nyako. CCSS 5.MD.5b: kemura ibibazo by'ingano by'isi nyayo.
kinyarwanda.pick_a_context_to_make_volume_real: 🌍 Hitamo imiterere kugira ngo ingano ibe nyayo:
kinyarwanda.the_rectangular_prism_above_shows_exac: 💡 Purizimu y'urukiramende iri hejuru yerekana neza icyo amagambo asobanura. Ingano ni umubare wa kibe z'igipimo zikwira imbere.
kinyarwanda.adjust_the_sliders_below_to_match_the_: Hindura ba-slider hepfo kugira ngo bihuze n'inkuru — cyangwa gerageza imiterere nshya. Kemura ibibazo 5 kugira ngo ubone 📝 Umurozi w'Amagambo. Sura imiterere 8 yose kugira 🌍 Umushakashatsi w'Isi Nyayo.
kinyarwanda.click_grid_to_place_cubes_click_cube_t: 👉 Kanda urusobe kugira ushyireho kibe • Kanda kibe kugira uyikureho • Kanda hejuru kugira utondeke
kinyarwanda.interactive_3d_viewport_drag_swipe_or_: Idirishya rifatanya rya 3D. Kurura, sunika, cyangwa koresha utubuto tw'imyambi kugira uzenguruke. Fyata cyangwa +/- kugira ukuze. R kugira usubiremo igaragaza.
kinyarwanda.visual_is_a_voxel_approximation_built_: ⚠ Igaragaza ni ikigereranyo cya voxel (cyubatswe muri kibe z'igipimo). Formule
kinyarwanda.slice_horizontally_to_see_the_area_tim: Ca mu buryo butambitse kugira urebe isano y'ubuso kuncuro ubujyakuzimu
kinyarwanda.square_units_volume_cross_section_area: ibipimo bya kare. Ingano = (ubuso bw'iciro riciye) × (ubujyakuzimu) ni ishingiro ry'imibare y'integaral.
kinyarwanda.adjust_your_predicted_dimensions_compa: Hindura ibipimo wahanuye, gereranya na purizimu nyayo. Igisubizo gitandukanye: hafi/hagati/kure. Nta manota, nta guhishura.
kinyarwanda.hypothesis_how_do_you_build_intuition_: Igitekerezo: Wubaka ute ubushishozi bwo guhanura ingano?
kinyarwanda.which_dimension_affects_volume_the_mos: Ni ikihe gipimo gihindura ingano cyane?
kinyarwanda.try_halving_one_dimension_what_happens: Gerageza kugabanya igipimo kimwe kigice — ni iki kibaho ku ngano?
kinyarwanda.when_are_predictions_hardest_when_easi: Ni ryari guhanura bigora cyane? Ni ryari byoroshye cyane?
kinyarwanda.explain_how_each_dimension_contributes: Sobanura uko buri gipimo gifasha ingano rusange.
kinyarwanda.design_note_discrete_3_state_outcome_n: Icyitonderwa cy'igishushanyo: igisubizo gitandukanye cy'imimerere 3; nta manota y'ingano nyayo; nta guhishura — ku bushake.
kinyarwanda.browse_named_structures_to_build: Reba imiterere ifite amazina yo kubaka
kinyarwanda.buildable_challenges_pick_a_structure_: 📚 Imbogamizi zishobora kubakwa — hitamo imiterere yo kugerageza
kinyarwanda.click_a_name_to_set_it_as_your_target_: Kanda izina kugira ngo urishyire nk'intego yawe — kibe zizagaragara nk'imirongo y'igicucu. Huza ishusho, hanyuma Genzura.
kinyarwanda.save_current_dims_cubes_with_a_name: Bika ibipimo + kibe za none n'izina
kinyarwanda.export_current_construction_as_png_ima: Ohereza iyubakwa rya none nk'ifoto PNG
kinyarwanda.download_a_png_snapshot_of_the_current: Kuramo ifoto PNG y'iyubakwa rya none
kinyarwanda.nothing_saved_yet_build_something_and_: Nta kintu kirabikwa. Ubaka ikintu maze ukande 💾 Bika.
kinyarwanda.6_solids_rotating_with_live_formulas: Ibintu bikomeye 6 bizenguruka bifite formule zikora
